source_pr.title: plan, mpp: refine the precision of avg(decimal) & avg(null) for mpp
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22685, https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22718<!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: 
1. the precision of avg after rewrited differs that runs on TiKV, especially observed by running tpch Q1.
2. avg(null) return errors

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed: force the return type as the same with original avg column.

How it Works:

### Related changes


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Integration test on [tiflash](https://github.com/pingcap/tics/pull/1344/files)
- integration test on tidb


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note <!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select b, avg(a) from t3 group by b order by 1, 2").Check(testkit.Rows("0 2.0000", "1 <nil>")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select b, avg(a) from t3 group by b order by 1, 2").Check(testkit.Rows("0 2.0000", "1 <nil>")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select b, avg(a) from t3 group by b order by 1, 2").Check(testkit.Rows("0 2.0000", "1 <nil>")) (executor/tiflash_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select b, avg(a) from t3 group by b order by 1, 2").Check(testkit.Rows("0 2.0000", "1 <nil>")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select b, avg(a) from t3 group by b order by 1, 2").Check(testkit.Rows("0 2.0000", "1 <nil>")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
